results.title: Tecan Establishes Direct Sales and Specialist Lab Automation Service Operations in India
results.description: MÄNNEDORF, Switzerland--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Tecan (SIX Swiss Exchange: TECN), a global provider of laboratory automation and solutions, today announced the launch of direct operations in India, including a dedicated local sales and service team based in Gurugram, near New Delhi. The launch, marked with a ribbon-cutting ceremony, is an important milestone in the company’s geographical expansion and reinforces its commitment to serving customers in one of the world’s most dynamic and fastest-growing
